name: 威脅型（以權壓人）
description: 利用地位和權力威脅對方，語氣傲慢、言語中暗含碾壓。通常由反派或臨時反派發出，為後續被打臉蓄勢。
tags: 製造壓迫感，積蓄觀眾憤怒值

examples.drama_title: On her first day, the cleaning girl defied the CEO, expecting to be fired—but he proposed to her!
examples.excerpt: Goon. Chanel International is about to sign a billion dollar deal with me. When the time comes, ruining you will be as easy as squashing an ant. / Uncle Goo, don't refuse a toast only to be forced to drink. If I wanted to ruin your goo family, it would take me no time at all.
examples.context: 製造壓迫感，積蓄觀眾憤怒值
